description: Behavioral: a witness cosignature whose signature does not verify under the witness's resolved assertionMethod key MUST fail consumer verification with invalid_witness_cosignature (RFC-ACDP-0015 §8 step 2, §10). The cosignature body is witness A's (witness_id did:web:witness.example.org, signature.key_id claiming witness A's key), but signature.value was produced by the WRONG key — witness B's private key (seed 0x44) over witness A's cosignature hash sha256:70f416... So when a consumer resolves did:web:witness.example.org#witness-key-1 (public key 17cb79...) and verifies, the signature does NOT verify. The cosignature parses and is well-formed; the failure is cryptographic — the analogue of rcpt-003 / log-004 for the witness layer. Behavioral — not executed by scripts/conformance-runner.py (no witness_test_keypair). MUST count toward N only if it verifies; here it MUST NOT.

witness_did_document.note: The resolved witness A DID document. witness-key-1 is the ONLY assertionMethod key (public key 17cb79fb2b4120f2b1ec65e4198d6e08b28e813feb01e4a400839b85e18080ce).

notes: RFC-ACDP-0015 §8 step 2: recompute the cosignature hash (sha256:70f416...), resolve signature.key_id (did:web:witness.example.org#witness-key-1 → public key 17cb79...), and verify signature.value over the ASCII bytes of the hash. The value is a valid Ed25519 signature by key d759793... (witness B), so it does NOT verify under 17cb79... (witness A) → FAIL.
SDKs surface the failure as invalid_witness_cosignature (RFC-ACDP-0015 §10) — deliberately distinct from invalid_log_proof: this indicts a witness's attestation, not the registry's log.
The failing cosignature does NOT count toward the N-witnessed total (RFC-ACDP-0015 §8); it does not, by itself, fail the checkpoint (the checkpoint verdict is RFC-ACDP-0012 §9.3, independent).

For contrast, the correct signature over this exact body by witness A's key is the wit-001 golden value omUcflbxeirUvPyIbuiGW0t7fch/xO2lSzTQwAvOAqsawocn4Y5J69Nwracq1I2Zercj5Qdnlc18NZQyoPcEBA== — the pinned wrong-key value differs.
